Thick jungle mist rises from fern-choked valleys at dawn.
Dust cloud explodes as stampeding hadrosaurs thunder across ancient plains.

Amber sunset glow illuminates airborne spores drifting through cycad forest.
Heavy rain curtain sweeps across volcanic landscape, obscuring distant mountains.

Giant dragonflies swarm through pollen-heavy air near towering tree ferns.

Gray ash falls silently post-eruption, coating prehistoric ferns and cycads.

Thermal shimmer distorts horizon where desert heat meets volcanic rock formations.
Early flowering magnolia petals drift slowly downward through warm Cretaceous breeze.

Torrential rain sheets sideways, erasing landscape in gray aquatic curtain.

Feathers drift mid-air from preening raptors perched on weathered rock outcrop.
